Off Calendar Feb-21-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: La Von Granger. Defendant's Attorney, Mark Hooshmand appeared and stated for the record that a motion is set to set aside the default. The court took the matter off calendar till the outcome of the hearing.
